title: task
description: Zephyr routing/ has dtn.c for delay-tolerant networking support. Neither Rust nor Python have DTN implementations. DTN is useful for intermittent connectivity scenarios. Consider porting or creating unified implementation.
notes:
Commit: cc7c16592
DTN implemented across implementations per original bead. Unified behavior for store-and-forward, eviction, expiry. See related closed beads (om67.5, v9eq, 70d2 etc). Ready to close.
close_reason: DTN ported and unified across Rust, Python, and Zephyr C implementations with consistent spec 9.8 behavior, tests, and bugfixes from codereviews. Original task completed.
